visual_summary: The image shows people riding down an escalator inside a subway or underground passage with textured walls and bright geometric tile patterns. The escalator leads to a busy tiled floor area where several pedestrians are walking past storefronts.
continuity_anchors: concrete wall texture with rectangular insets
colored tile pattern on side walls
plausible_actions: people riding escalator up or down
cinematic_notes: use leading lines of escalator to guide viewer eye into the scene
play with varying depths of field focusing on commuters or architectural detail
consider low angle shots from escalator steps for dynamic perspective

visual_summary: A blue and white subway train is stationed at an underground platform labeled 'Université Concordia.' Several passengers wait on the platform, some engaged with their phones or talking on the phone, while others sit inside the train. The station features a tiled floor, yellow safety strip, and overhead fluorescent lighting.
location: Underground subway station platform, Université Concordia
continuity_anchors: blue and white train with multiple doors
yellow tactile safety strip along platform edge
plausible_actions: passengers boarding or exiting the train
cinematic_notes: use wide angle to capture the length of the train and depth of station
play with reflections on train windows for layered shots
explore low-angle shots along the yellow strip for dynamic perspective
fluorescent lighting creates a cool, sterile mood that can be enhanced or contrasted with warmer light sources

visual_summary: The image depicts an underground metro station platform with several passengers waiting or walking alongside the train doors. The platform is clean and well-lit with long overhead lights, and the right side features a reflective green wall, adding depth to the scene.
continuity_anchors: row of sliding glass train doors
dark ceiling panels with elongated lights
grey tiled floor with a tactile pathway
green reflective wall on the right
plausible_actions: commuters boarding or exiting the train
sitting on benches waiting for the train
cinematic_notes: use reflections on the green wall for creative framing or doubling of subjects
long linear lights create leading lines for dynamic camera movement
tracking shots following commuters along the platform to emphasize routine or transition

visual_summary: The image shows an exterior urban scene viewed through a slightly dirty window, revealing a parking lot with multiple parked vehicles, including police and utility vehicles. Beyond the parking lot, there are multi-story residential and office buildings under an overcast sky.
location: Urban parking lot surrounded by mid-rise residential and commercial buildings
continuity_anchors: position of parked vehicles in lot
placement of white and black utility vehicles
orange construction tarps on right building facade
plausible_actions: cars entering or leaving parking lot
people walking from buildings to vehicles
maintenance or police activity around vehicles

capture reflections on glass for atmospheric effect
use grey sky for diffused, even lighting in exterior shots
